task: why is an item missing from the work bench timeline
target_hint: Check status filters, date range, customer on the order, line start/end dates, actual pickup/return dates, returned line filtering, and range overlap.
Explain Request, Quote, Reservation, Order, Received, Closed columns and that status changes happen inside the rental order.
Explain Pick/Return as a movement checklist showing Equipment out and Equipment back by day; actual dates are recorded on rental order line items.
Explain availability/demand controls, donut counts/colors, trend lines, upcoming demand, incidents, and status/date/assignment dependencies.
Explain committed/potential availability, demand from statuses, shortfalls below zero, quote/request demand, and incoming purchase orders.

task: add line item on rental order
target_hint: Add line item, choose equipment type, open Booked Dates, enter Start/End, choose Period/Rate, select Unit when required, and use Actual Dates only when equipment goes out or returns.

task: why can't I select a unit
target_hint: Explain unit locking and availability by status: quote/quote_rejected/requested lock units, reservation optional, ordered allows TBD but actual pickup requires unit/bundle, received/closed require unit/bundle.

task: why can't I record actual pickup
target_hint: Explain actual pickup requires a selected unit or valid bundle, cannot be in the future, and uses actual field event dates.

task: why is my asset not showing on the map
target_hint: Explain map markers require coordinates on current location or base location; text-only locations can appear in tables but cannot plot.

task: explain asset current location versus base location
target_hint: Explain base location is normal yard/branch/home; current location is present tracked physical location; blank current location means same as base location in UI.
